scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../react && npm install
scripts.build: cd react && npm install && cross-env VITE_BASE=/app/ npm run build
scripts.deploy:build: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.deploy:docker: docker build -t super-eletrolar . && docker run -p 4000:4000 -e NODE_ENV=production -e JWT_SECRET=prod-secret super-eletrolar
